title: Souls Forge
description: Use the souls of your enemies to create new Weapons and Armour.
body:
This datapack introduces a whole new style of magic to your Minecraft worlds, with access to Soul Shards, a unique system that enhances gameplay through experience-based mechanics and combat.

# What To Expect:
### Soul Shards
Collect experience points inside an Amethyst Shard. This converts your XP into Soul Shards, which can then be used for crafting new materials and weapons.

### Soul Shard Blocks
A unique feature of the datapack, Soul Shard Blocks shatter when a player falls from a height of more than 4 blocks, scattering a random amount of Soul Shards.

### Soul Silver Ingots
Soul Silver is created by combining Soul Shards, Echo Shards and Iron Ingots. Use it to craft the new weapons and armour.

### Silver Armour
Crafted from Soul Silver, this armour provides strong protection (slightly weaker than Netherite without knockback resistance) and gives the unique ability to make nearby Illagers neutral. It can be repaired with Soul Silver.

### Soul Totem
This item is craftable from Soul Shards and Soul Silver Ingots an will save you from death! When used it will break, losing its lush and colour. You can recharge it by crafting it with a single soul shard to breathe new life into it, and yourself!

## Soul Weapons
This pack adds a range of weapons made from Soul Shards and Soul Silver. These weapons come with unique abilities and are repairable using Soul Silver:

**Soul Spear:** A long-range melee weapon with moderate attack power.

**Soul Sword:** A generic, straightforward soul weapon.

**Soul Axe:** A powerful weapon that can also chop down trees.

**Soul Hammer:** The strongest of the soul weapons, capable of dealing AoE damage and breaking fragile blocks.

### Soul Enchantments
Absorb XP with your Soul Weapon to fill a Soul Bar. When the bar is full, the weapon receives a random Soul Enchantment that enhances its stats or grants special abilities.

# FAQ's
Any questions asked in other channels will appear here. (Feel free to join the discord to ask a question! The discord also comes with Wiki pages for all new packs.)
